title: Server List
description: A mod that adds a server IP list so that you can copy them.
body:
This mod is a mod adding a GUI that has server IPs on it. Press R ingame to open (You can change the keybind)

The reason you should download this mod is because it is a pain looking up the ips of some servers. This mod fixes it. Just press R ingame to open the Server IPs GUI.

Features:
- Open Server IP's GUI Ingame

Plans:
- Make it so that you don't have to use the keybind ingame.
